notes: v358 — SIGNAL FLAGS ON THE MARKET RADAR. You can now tap-filter the whole market by the report-card signal flags straight from the 📡 Market Radar. Six new tiles: 🚀 Breakout, 🥇 Vol Record, 🔷 Block Day, 🏛️ Inst?, ↗ MA Cross, 📉 Dist?. Tap one to show only those shares, tap again to clear — and they stack with each other and the existing tiles (e.g. tap 🚀 Breakout + 🥇 Vol Record together to see shares with BOTH). The counts match what you see fire in your Signal Report Card. The technical ones (Breakout / Vol Record / MA Cross) fill in as the day's data finishes preparing, just like the Score 7+ tile — so give it a moment after loading. All are estimates from price and volume, never confirmed filings, and 📉 Dist? is a warning (falling on heavy volume), not a buy. Hard-refresh (Ctrl+F5) to load v358. ALSO RECENT — v357 fixed 'not loading all data' (run Download all once after updating); v356 the radar no longer disappears on refresh + a 🔬 Research button. (Older notes live in the Owner's Manual changelog.)
